title: alice in wonderland.jar
description: A nostalgic experience that feels slightly off.
body:
Alice in Wonderland.jar is a beta-related modpack that keeps some modern features. Most notably it brings back beloved beta sounds and textures while also modifying modern items to fit in the old programmer-art.

This is a normal beta experience. Nothing out of the ordinary is to be seen. This pack is very lightweight and should run on any computer that can normally run Minecraft.

In the testing of this pack, multiple friends of mine have stated that upon sleeping they would see strange repeating patterns, or even have themselves trapped into a new, beautiful world. These are nothing but rumours and should be treated as attempts of fearmongering, nothing like that would exist here.


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer for our Testers</summary>
Some areas might incluse photosensitive effects, and if you couldn't make it out from the previous description... don't play this if you don't like horror!
  
>   and also.. for obvious reasons, this is not related to alice in wonderland.. the book.. nor the movie.. it's just a silly thing. it's related to the modpack it's built around. thank you modrinth.
</details>
